modules.title: Computer & Digital Fundamental
modules.description: Fundamentu komputador no alfabetizasaun digital ba ema hotu. Aprende uza komputador, internet, no ferramenta digital báziku.

modules.title: Graphic Design Fundamental
modules.description: Prinsipiu básiku design gráfiku ho Canva Professional. Aprende kria materiál marketing, social media design, no brand identity.

modules.title: Advanced Graphic Design
modules.description: Aprende Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator no Video Editing. Kria logo, branding, no materiál promosionál profesional.

modules.title: UI/UX Design
modules.description: Desenha interfase no esperiénsia uzuáriu ho Figma. Aprende UX research, wireframe, protótipu, no usability testing.

modules.title: Web Fundamental
modules.description: Fundamentu web development ho HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS no JavaScript. Kria website responsivu no interativu.

modules.title: Frontend Development
modules.description: Desenvolve aplikasaun web modernu ho ReactJS no Next.js. Aprende state management, routing, no integrasaun ho API.

modules.title: Database & Backend
modules.description: Aprende backend development ho PHP, Laravel no database MySQL/PostgreSQL. Kria sistema CRUD, autentikasaun, no API.

modules.title: API & Fullstack
modules.description: Integra frontend no backend ho REST API. Aprende JWT authentication, Laravel Sanctum, no deploy aplikasaun.

modules.title: Mobile Development
modules.description: Desenvolve aplikasaun mobile cross-platform ho Flutter. Aprende Dart, widget system, state management, no API integration.

modules.title: Modern Backend
modules.description: Aprende backend modernu ho Node.js, Express, TypeScript no Golang. Kria API real-time no microservice.

modules.title: DevOps & Cloud
modules.description: Aprende deployment no manutensaun aplikasaun iha nuvem. Linux, Docker, VPS, CI/CD, no SSL.

modules.title: AI & Emerging Technology
modules.description: Esplora inteligência artificial no teknolojia emergente. ChatGPT, Midjourney, prompt engineering, no AI automation.
